title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Railway Protection Force Act, 1957. (2) It extends to the whole of India. (3) It shall come into force on such date 1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 10th September 1959, vide notification No. 58-security/16/9, dated 10-9-1959, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, s. 1. Extended to Goa, Daman and Diu with modifications, by Reg. 12 of 1962, s. 3 and Schedule. The Act comes into force in Pondicherry on 1-10-1963, s. 3 and Schedule I. Extended to and brought into force in Dadra and Nagar Haveli (w.e.f. 1-7-1965) by Reg. 6 of 1963, s. 2 and Schedule I.
